speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: Fellows, stand fast. I see a passenger.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: If there be ten, shrink not, but down with ’em.

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: Stand, sir, and throw us that you have about you.

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: If not, we’ll make you sit, and rifle you.

speaker: SPEED
text: Sir, we are undone; these are the villains

speaker: SPEED
text: That all the travelers do fear so much.

speaker: VALENTINE
text: My friends—

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: That’s not so, sir. We are your enemies.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: Peace. We’ll hear him.

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: Ay, by my beard, will we, for he is a proper man.

speaker: VALENTINE
text: Then know that I have little wealth to lose.

speaker: VALENTINE
text: A man I am crossed with adversity;

speaker: VALENTINE
text: My riches are these poor habiliments,

speaker: VALENTINE
text: Of which, if you should here disfurnish me,

speaker: VALENTINE
text: You take the sum and substance that I have.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: Whither travel you?

speaker: VALENTINE
text: To Verona.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: Whence came you?

speaker: VALENTINE
text: From Milan.

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: Have you long sojourned there?

speaker: VALENTINE
text: Some sixteen months, and longer might have stayed

speaker: VALENTINE
text: If crooked fortune had not thwarted me.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: What, were you banished thence?

speaker: VALENTINE
text: I was.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: For what offense?

speaker: VALENTINE
text: For that which now torments me to rehearse;

speaker: VALENTINE
text: I killed a man, whose death I much repent,

speaker: VALENTINE
text: But yet I slew him manfully in fight

speaker: VALENTINE
text: Without false vantage or base treachery.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: Why, ne’er repent it if it were done so;

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: But were you banished for so small a fault?

speaker: VALENTINE
text: I was, and held me glad of such a doom.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: Have you the tongues?

speaker: VALENTINE
text: My youthful travel therein made me happy,

speaker: VALENTINE
text: Or else I often had been miserable.

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: By the bare scalp of Robin Hood’s fat friar,

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: This fellow were a king for our wild faction.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: We’ll have him.—Sirs, a word.

speaker: SPEED
text: Master, be one of them. It’s an honorable kind

speaker: SPEED
text: of thievery.

speaker: VALENTINE
text: Peace, villain.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: Tell us this: have you anything to take to?

speaker: VALENTINE
text: Nothing but my fortune.

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: Know then that some of us are gentlemen,

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: Such as the fury of ungoverned youth

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: Thrust from the company of awful men.

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: Myself was from Verona banishèd

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: For practicing to steal away a lady,

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: An heir and near allied unto the Duke.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: And I from Mantua, for a gentleman

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: Who, in my mood, I stabbed unto the heart.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: And I for such like petty crimes as these.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: But to the purpose: for we cite our faults

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: That they may hold excused our lawless lives,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: And partly seeing you are beautified

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: With goodly shape, and by your own report

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: A linguist, and a man of such perfection

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: As we do in our quality much want—

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: Indeed because you are a banished man,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: Therefore, above the rest, we parley to you.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: Are you content to be our general,

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: To make a virtue of necessity

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: And live as we do in this wilderness?

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: What sayst thou? Wilt thou be of our consort?

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: Say ay, and be the captain of us all;

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: We’ll do thee homage and be ruled by thee,

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: Love thee as our commander and our king.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              OUTLAW
text: But if thou scorn our courtesy, thou diest.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              OUTLAW
text: Thou shalt not live to brag what we have offered.

speaker: VALENTINE
text: I take your offer and will live with you,

speaker: VALENTINE
text: Provided that you do no outrages

speaker: VALENTINE
text: On silly women or poor passengers.

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: No, we detest such vile base practices.

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: Come, go with us; we’ll bring thee to our crews

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: And show thee all the treasure we have got,

speaker:
THIRD
               
              OUTLAW
text: Which, with ourselves, all rest at thy dispose.
